name: The Fool
upright_meaning: A fresh start, openness, and trusting the path ahead.
reversed_meaning: Hesitation, fear of the unknown, or acting without thinking.
advice_upright: Take a small step forward even if you don’t feel fully ready.
advice_reversed: Slow down and check in with yourself before moving ahead.

name: The Magician
upright_meaning: You have the tools and ability to create what you want.
reversed_meaning: Self-doubt, scattered energy, or not using your potential.
advice_upright: Focus your energy on one clear intention today.
advice_reversed: Reconnect with your confidence before taking action.

name: The High Priestess
upright_meaning: Trust your intuition and listen to what isn’t being said.
reversed_meaning: Ignoring your intuition or feeling disconnected from yourself.
advice_upright: Take quiet time to hear your inner guidance.
advice_reversed: Pause before reacting; your emotions need space to settle.

name: The Empress
upright_meaning: Growth, comfort, and emotional nourishment.
reversed_meaning: Neglecting your needs or feeling drained.
advice_upright: Give yourself softness and care today.
advice_reversed: Set boundaries and refill your own cup first.

name: The Emperor
upright_meaning: Take control and create order in your life.
advice_upright: Make a clear plan and follow through.
advice_reversed: Loosen your grip and allow flexibility.

name: The Hierophant
upright_meaning: Seek wisdom from trusted sources or established practices.
reversed_meaning: Breaking free from old patterns or expectations.
advice_upright: Lean on routines or mentors that support you.
advice_reversed: Do things your own way, even if it’s unconventional.

name: The Lovers
upright_meaning: Harmony, unity, and meaningful choices.
advice_upright: Choose what aligns with your values.
advice_reversed: Reconnect with yourself before making decisions.

name: The Chariot
upright_meaning: Forward movement through focus and discipline.
reversed_meaning: Lack of direction or feeling stuck.
advice_upright: Stay focused on your goal and keep moving.
advice_reversed: Pause and realign your direction before pushing ahead.

name: Strength
upright_meaning: Gentle strength and emotional resilience.
advice_upright: Lead with compassion, not force.
advice_reversed: Be kind to yourself; you’re carrying too much.

name: The Hermit
upright_meaning: A time for introspection and clarity.
advice_upright: Take quiet time to reconnect with yourself.
advice_reversed: Reach out; you don’t have to do everything alone.

name: Wheel of Fortune
upright_meaning: Life is shifting; embrace the change.
advice_upright: Stay flexible and open to new opportunities.
advice_reversed: Let go of what you can’t control.

name: Justice
upright_meaning: Clarity, honesty, and accountability.
advice_upright: Be honest with yourself and others.
advice_reversed: Restore balance before moving forward.

name: The Hanged Man
upright_meaning: A shift in perspective brings clarity.
advice_upright: Let go and allow things to unfold.
advice_reversed: Stop forcing things; step back and reassess.

name: Death
upright_meaning: A necessary ending that leads to renewal.
reversed_meaning: Holding onto what needs to be released.
advice_upright: Allow the old to fall away.
advice_reversed: Gently loosen your grip on what’s no longer serving you.

name: Temperance
upright_meaning: Harmony and steady progress.
advice_upright: Take things slowly and stay centered.
advice_reversed: Simplify and return to what grounds you.

name: The Devil
upright_meaning: Awareness of unhealthy patterns or attachments.
advice_upright: Notice what’s controlling your energy.
advice_reversed: Take a small step toward freedom today.

name: The Tower
upright_meaning: Sudden change that clears the way for truth.
advice_upright: Let what needs to fall, fall.
advice_reversed: Prepare gently for change instead of resisting it.

name: The Star
upright_meaning: Renewal, inspiration, and emotional clarity.
reversed_meaning: Doubt or feeling disconnected from hope.
advice_upright: Trust that healing is unfolding.
advice_reversed: Reconnect with something that brings you peace.

name: The Moon
upright_meaning: Listen to your intuition; not everything is clear yet.
advice_upright: Move gently and trust your instincts.
advice_reversed: Let the truth settle before acting.

name: The Sun
upright_meaning: Positivity, warmth, and confidence.
advice_upright: Lean into what feels good and energizing.
advice_reversed: Be gentle with yourself; brighter energy is returning.

name: Judgement
upright_meaning: A moment of clarity or self-realization.
advice_upright: Listen to your inner truth.
advice_reversed: Release harsh self-judgment.

name: The World
upright_meaning: A cycle is complete; you’ve grown.
advice_upright: Celebrate your progress.
advice_reversed: Tie up loose ends before moving on.

upright_meaning: A fresh start, openness, and trusting the path ahead.
reversed_meaning: Hesitation, fear of the unknown, or acting without thinking.
advice_upright: Take a small step forward even if you don’t feel fully ready.
